title: Filipino Rice Cakes with Sweet Skewers
description: A traditional Filipino street food recipe featuring sweet and chewy rice cakes served with a side of sweet skewers.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together rice flour, grated coconut, brown sugar, and corn oil.
Add in the egg and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes pliable.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired size.
Shape each piece into a small cake.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and cook the rice cakes for 2-3 minutes on each side.
While the rice cakes are cooking, thread a piece of mango and pineapple onto each skewer.
Serve the rice cakes with the sweet skewers on the side.
